__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_import_artifact_compare
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_import_handoff_archive_compare.json. The import activation emits one open_flow_sheet_record (open_flow_sheet_class = import_artifact, sheet_surface_class = dedicated_review_surface — the comparison needs side-by-side scanning). The sheet exposes target_type (handoff_packet), policy_restrictions (no authority_delta, migration_review_required), result_mode (resolved compare_before_restore), destination_disposition (write_to_labelled_staging), side_effect (toolchain_detect_only, moderate, local_only, rollback_checkpoint_retained), profile_default (depends_on_artifact_class with override), trust_posture (trust_unchanged_until_admit), fallback (cancel, rollback, inspect-only). Demonstrates §5.1 import_artifact, §5.2 axes, §5.3 invariants 1–5.

target_type_disclosure.summary: Signed handoff packet from a peer environment. signature_state = signed_verified.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Import never widens trust until per-item migration outcomes are admitted.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Comparison resolved before commit; user reviews per-item outcomes alongside the active workspace.

destination_disposition_disclosure.summary: Imported items extract to labelled staging; durable apply requires a pre-import checkpoint.

side_effect_disclosure.summary: Local-only extraction. Pre-apply checkpoint retained for rollback.

profile_default_disclosure.summary: handoff_packet does not retarget the active profile; portable_state_package would. Override available.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust remains unchanged until the migration result admits per-item outcomes.

restore_class_disclosure.summary: Compare-before-restore is the canonical pre-apply review for handoff imports.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel and rollback both preserve the active workspace; inspect-only renders extracted items without applying.

presentation_label: Import handoff packet · Compare before apply
presentation_subtitle: Pre-import checkpoint retained. Trust unchanged until per-item outcomes admit.
